title: Planning State Live-Only Contract
goal: Make planning-state/v1 live-only: state.toml must not contain completed, dismissed, closed, or historical work.
Remove stale completed roadmap candidates from this repo's state.toml.
Keep historical evidence in archived execplans, external evidence, Memory, or docs instead of first-line planning state.
non_goals: Do not redesign finished-work inspection or historical audit projection.
Do not implement deferred issues #595, #627, or #661.

intent.outcome: state.toml only contains live/selectable planning work; completed history is rejected and not produced by archive.
intent.constraints: Keep the change bounded to planning-state validation/projection/archive behavior and this repo's stale state rows.
intent.latitude: Tighten validation, update archive cleanup, adjust tests, and remove stale completed rows.
intent.escalation: Escalate if callers require state.toml to retain closed work as a first-line historical ledger.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed execplan after closeout validation.
execution.proof: Focused planning installer/summary tests, planning surface checker, ruff, and make check before closeout.

invariants: state.toml is live/selectable work state, not historical storage.
Archive remains the durable historical evidence owner for completed execplans.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: User feedback: Planning state should never contain historical/completed work

iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: User feedback: Planning state should never contain historical/completed work
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Reject completed/historical planning-state rows and stop archive from creating them.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml, this execplan, packages/planning installer/tests, workspace summary tests.
execution_bounds.max changed files: About 8; stop before broad finished-work inspection rewrites.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run ruff check packages/planning tests; make check before closeout.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Tightening planning-state/v1 so first-line state is live-only.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

immediate_next_action: Tighten planning-state validation and archive cleanup, then validate.
invariants: state.toml is live/selectable work state, not historical storage.
Archive remains the durable historical evidence owner for completed execplans.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check packages/planning tests
completion_criteria: Planning State Live-Only Contract is implemented, validated, and closed out honestly.

execution_run.what happened: Tightened planning-state/v1 to live/selectable work only, removed historical state rows, and stopped archive cleanup from writing closed work_items back into state.toml. Also fixed upgrade-source staleness threshold consistency exposed by full validation.
execution_run.scope touched: Planning validation/projection/archive cleanup, affected tests, current planning state, and the memory/planning upgrade-source boundary check.
execution_run.changed surfaces: installer.py in planning and memory packages, planning/workspace summary tests, state.toml, and this execplan.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run ruff check packages/planning tests; make check
execution_run.result for continuation: No continuation needed for this slice after archive.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; only live-state contract and validation fallout were changed
finished_run_review.config compliance: used package planning state and closeout flow

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: make check passed after targeted tests, lint, format, typecheck, payload verification, schema docs, planning surfaces, and structured-file inventory.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: User feedback: Planning state should never contain historical/completed work
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: planning-state/v1 no longer accepts done/dismissed/closed/completed rows, projection skips historical rows, archive cleanup removes active state instead of writing closed rows, and this repo's state.toml no longer contains completed candidates.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Planning state is live-only and archive closeout no longer preserves completed work in state.toml.
execution_summary.resume from: no active work for this slice

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The live-state contract is implemented and full validation passes.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Archived execplan plus passing make check.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A lifecycle command writes done/dismissed/closed/completed rows back into planning state or summary treats them as clean live state.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: Upgrade-source freshness warning boundary disagreed with lifecycle freshness at exactly the configured threshold.
signals fixed: Changed planning and memory stale-source warnings to trigger only after the configured threshold, matching freshness reporting.
